name_en: Top-tier original factory with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original factory with full packaging
Dior Miss Caro chain bag is here to stay!! Hot all over the internet 🤤 It's bound to be the favorite little bag of the summer 👍 Still features the classic trellis pattern, truly never gets old. Alternating metal chain links and enamel chain links in the same color as the leather ✔️ A god-tier existence, cute and chic, the look is absolutely top-tier! The internal compartment capacity is sufficient for daily use, and it can be worn crossbody, shoulder, or underarm 🤍
